summary: Clear audience tape captures an incredible Scarlet > Fire and China > Rider, with Jerry on his A‑game and a crisp mix.
review: The audience recording is surprisingly clear – cymbals cut through and Phil’s bass is audible – making the standout Scarlet > Fire sequence shine. Reviewers also rave about the smoking China > Rider and note that Jerry, Phil and Donna are all firing on all cylinders during this late‑January ’79 stretch.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance highlighted by two superb song sequences and a clear audience tape; limited to one detailed review, so confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape sounds really good; cymbals are clear, Phil’s bass is well‑defined, overall mix is clean for a crowd source.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy Indiana show with the band kicking things up a notch; late‑tour dates feature tight transitions and strong vocal performances.

band_member_comments.Jerry: On his A‑game for most of this tour, delivering top‑notch guitar work.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass sounds good and clear in the mix.
